headline: Consumers Energy Helping Customers Prepare for a Week of Extreme Heat
summary: Temperatures are heating up across Michigan this week and Consumers Energy is sharing simple tips to help customers stay safe, comfortable and make the most of their energy use now and throughout the summer.
